title: My Work Dashboard
excerpt:
My users would love to see a dashboard from the data in My Work, especially when My Work can be customizable with different users. 
Create the functionality that the My Work can be seen in chart views or even spreadsheet…

posts.author: jgore (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
My users would love to see a dashboard from the data in My Work, especially when My Work can be customizable with different users.

Create the functionality that the My Work can be seen in chart views or even spreadsheet views.

posts.author: amelia.sugianto (Amelia Sugianto)
posts.cookedHtml: Hugely agree! It would be awesome if the My Work section had any of the functionality of a normal board - the dashboard flexibility being the most important.
